pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the design agency, highlighting key work, services, and shop offerings, and routing users to main tasks.
primary_functions: Highlight featured portfolio case studies, services, and products with clear calls to action.
Provide quick access to Portfolio, Shop, Services, Blog, Project Planner, and other key sections.
Surface featured case studies, templates, and digital resources that can be opened for more detail.
Promote newsletter subscription and project inquiry via prominent CTAs.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary "View our work" CTA or header "Work" link
Click "Explore services" CTA
Click featured shop/category cards or header "Shop" link
Click featured article or header "Blog" link
Click "Start a project" CTA
Click homepage newsletter signup teaser

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Home" in main header navigation
Primary landing URL of the site ("/")

pages.name: Portfolio
pages.description: Filterable portfolio grid of case studies across industries, years, and service types.
primary_functions: Display a grid of case study cards with thumbnail, title, year, industry, and service type.
Provide filters for industry (e.g., restaurant, healthcare, fintech, education, food_beverage), year range (e.g., 2021–2024), and service type (e.g., product_design, ux_ui, mobile_app_design).
Allow sorting of case studies by newest_first, oldest_first, and featured.
Allow users to open an individual case study detail page from the grid.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a case study card in the portfolio grid
Change filters or sort options and update URL to reflect selection

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Work" in main header navigation
Linked from CTAs on Home, About, and Services pages

pages.name: Case Study Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single portfolio project or case study.
primary_functions: Show full project content including overview, process, outcomes, and key features.
Display metadata such as industry, year, services, and project type (e.g., restaurant branding, mobile app design).
Provide an Add to Favorites button (heart icon) to save this case study to the user’s favorites list.
Offer navigation back to the main Portfolio listing and to related case studies.

incoming_params.description: CaseStudy ID used by getCaseStudyDetails to load the correct project.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to all work" breadcrumb
Click on a related case study card
Click header "Favorites" icon after saving the case study

access_methods.description: Accessed via links from portfolio grid or favorites list with ?id={caseStudyId}

pages.name: Shop Landing
pages.description: Main entry to the shop, listing primary product categories.
primary_functions: Present main shop categories such as website_templates, digital_downloads, ui_kits, and merchandise.
Allow users to click into a category to open the Shop Category Listing page (shop_category.html) with the appropriate categoryId.
Highlight featured products, bundles, and promotions (e.g., WELCOME10 coupon for UI kits).
Provide quick shortcuts to popular subcategories like ecommerce_templates, portfolio_templates, and design_resources.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Website Templates" category card or shortcut
Click "Digital Downloads / Design Resources" category card
Click "UI Kits & Bundles" category card or WELCOME10 promo banner
Click "Merchandise / Prints" category card

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Shop" in main header navigation
Accessed via "Shop" in footer links

pages.name: Shop Category Listing
pages.description: Filterable listing page for products within a specific shop category (e.g., website templates, merchandise, digital downloads, UI kits).
primary_functions: Display a product grid for the selected category (via categoryId such as website_templates, merchandise, digital_downloads, ui_kits).
Provide subcategory/type filters (e.g., ecommerce, portfolio, icon_sets, ui_kits, mockups, illustrations) where relevant.
Provide filters for price range (min_price, max_price), rating thresholds (e.g., 4_stars_plus, 4_5_stars_plus), shipping options (e.g., free_shipping), and attributes like color (e.g., blue).
Allow sorting options such as rating_high_to_low and price_low_to_high.
Allow users to open an individual product detail page from the product card.
Optionally allow quick Add to Cart or Add to Favorites actions from product cards for convenience.

incoming_params.description: Optional flag to show only items with free shipping.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card
Apply or change filters/sort; URL is updated to reflect choices
Click header cart icon after adding items from listing

access_methods.description: Accessed from Shop Landing and promos via ?category={categoryId}

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed product page for templates, digital resources, UI kits, and merchandise.
primary_functions: Show full product information including images, description, feature list (e.g., desktop_layouts, mobile_layouts), category, creator/author, price, rating, and shipping info.
Allow selection of variants such as color (e.g., blue) or format, and adjustment of quantity.
Provide an Add to Cart button to place a single unit or multiple units into the cart.
Provide an Add to Favorites (heart) button for saving digital products or templates to the favorites list.
Show breadcrumb navigation back to the relevant Shop Category Listing view.

incoming_params.description: Product ID used by getProductDetails to load the correct product.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click breadcrumb "Back to templates" or "Back to merchandise"
Click header cart icon after adding a product to cart
Click header "Favorites" icon to review saved products

access_methods.description: Accessed from shop listings or favorites via ?id={productId}

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page to review selected products, apply coupons, and adjust quantities.
primary_functions: List all products currently in the cart with name, category, variants (e.g., color), price, quantity, and subtotal.
Allow users to change item quantities (including increasing the quantity of the cheapest item) and remove products.
Provide a promo code input field to enter and apply coupon codes (e.g., WELCOME10) and update totals.
Show cart subtotal, discounts, estimated total, and a Proceed to Checkout button that leads to checkout.html.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Proceed to Checkout" button
Click "Continue shopping" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Cart" icon/link in header
Redirected to after some Add to Cart actions (optional UX)

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout review page for confirming order details and entering contact information before payment.
primary_functions: Display an order summary with items, quantities, applied discounts, and final total.
Collect basic customer details such as name and email address (e.g., morgan.chan@example.com).
Allow selection of delivery options appropriate for digital products (e.g., standard digital delivery or default option).
Provide a final confirmation or Continue button (without processing payment) to simulate proceeding past review.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to cart" link to modify items

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking "Proceed to Checkout" on cart page

pages.name: Services
pages.description: Overview of the agency’s services with a focus on branding packages and their feature comparison.
primary_functions: Present a list of core services such as branding, digital product design, and strategy.
Display a dedicated Branding Packages section with a comparison table listing packages, prices, and included features like logo_design and brand_guidelines.
Highlight which branding packages fall under specific price thresholds (e.g., under 5000).
Provide Start Project or Request Quote buttons tied to each package that link to the Project Request page (project_request.html) with the relevant package selected.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Start Project" / "Request Quote" on a specific branding package
Click "See branding work" CTA

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Services" in main header navigation
Accessed via "Services" in footer links

pages.name: Project Request
pages.description: Form page for requesting a specific service package, particularly branding packages.
primary_functions: Allow the user to choose or confirm a selected package (e.g., a branding package that includes logo_design and brand_guidelines) in a Package dropdown.
Provide fields for a project description/brief where the user can describe needs in multiple sentences.
Collect budget information (e.g., numeric budget between 3000 and 4900) and a timeline selection (including an option close to 4_6_weeks).
Collect contact details such as name and email (e.g., jordan.lee@example.com).
Submit the request form and show a confirmation or thank-you message.

incoming_params.description: Preselected ServicePackage ID from the Services comparison table.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to services" link after submission or if user cancels

access_methods.description: Accessed from Start Project / Request Quote buttons on Services page

pages.name: Project Planner
pages.description: In-depth planning form for complex projects such as multi-industry mobile app design.
primary_functions: Provide a Project Name field for naming the initiative (e.g., Multi-Industry Learning & Finance App).
Provide a main description text area where users can reference insights from multiple case studies (e.g., healthcare, fintech, education mobile apps) in several sentences.
Include a date picker or date input for setting a target launch date (e.g., 2025-09-01).
Offer budget range options including an option for 50_000_75_000 or closest equivalent.
Collect contact details such as name and email (e.g., alex.rivera@example.com).
Allow submission of the project plan and display a confirmation or next steps message.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click helper link "Review more app case studies" from planner intro

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Project Planner" in main header navigation
Accessed via "Project Planner" in footer links

pages.name: Blog / Insights
pages.description: Listing of articles and case study-style posts, with filters for UX content and recency.
primary_functions: Display a paginated list or grid of blog posts with titles, excerpts, tags, and dates.
Provide filters by tag or category (e.g., ux, user_experience) and by year/date (e.g., 2023 and later).
Allow sorting by newest_first and other basic orders if needed.
Allow users to open an individual article detail page from the listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a blog post card or title
Change blog filters or sort; URL is updated

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Blog" in main header navigation
Accessed via "Blog / Insights" in footer

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single blog or insights article.
primary_functions: Display the full article content including title, date, author, and body text.
Support scrolling through the article and reviewing any images or embedded media.
Provide breadcrumb or back-to-blog navigation to return to the filtered Blog listing.
Include the global footer with a Newsletter or Subscribe link that takes the user to the Newsletter Subscribe page.

incoming_params.description: BlogPost ID used by getBlogPostDetails to load the article.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to insights" breadcrumb
Click "Subscribe" / "Stay Updated" link or footer Newsletter link

access_methods.description: Accessed from Blog listing via ?id={postId}

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Central page for reviewing and managing all saved items, including portfolio case studies and digital products.
primary_functions: Display a list or grid of all favorited items, including case studies and shop products (e.g., digital downloads and templates).
Allow users to filter or group favorites by type (e.g., case_studies, templates, digital_resources).
Provide options to open any favorite item in its detail page (case_study.html or product.html).
Allow removal of items from the favorites list.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for favorites view (e.g., "case_study" or "product").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved case study card
Click on a saved product card

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Favorites" icon/link in header

pages.name: Newsletter Subscribe
pages.description: Dedicated subscription form for the agency’s newsletter, focused on design tips.
primary_functions: Offer input fields for subscriber name and email (e.g., taylor.kim@example.com).
Provide a checkbox or multi-select for interests/topics (e.g., design_tips) and a frequency dropdown including a monthly option.
Include an optional notes or topics_of_interest text area where users can refer to specific UX post titles.
Allow users to submit the subscription form and show a success confirmation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to insights" link after subscribing

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Newsletter" in footer
Accessed via Subscribe CTAs from Article pages and Home

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the design agency, its team, and its approach.
primary_functions: Present the studio’s story, values, and areas of expertise (e.g., branding, UX/UI, product design).
Highlight selected achievements, clients, and differentiators.
Provide links back to Portfolio, Services, Shop, and Project Planner for deeper engagement.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA to view selected work
Click CTA to explore services
Click "Start a project" CTA

access_methods.description: Accessed via "About" link in footer

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries not tied to a specific project form.
primary_functions: Display contact information such as email address, studio location, and social links.
Provide a simple contact form for general questions or partnership inquiries.
Route users to more specialized forms (Project Request or Project Planner) when appropriate.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link to discuss branding packages specifically
Click link to start a full project brief

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Contact" link in footer

pages.name: Legal & Policies
pages.description: Combined legal information including terms of use, privacy policy, and shipping/returns details.
primary_functions: Present terms of service for using the website and purchasing products.
Explain the privacy policy, including data handling for forms and newsletter subscriptions.
Outline shipping, free_shipping conditions, and returns/refund policies (especially for merchandise and digital goods).

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Legal & Policies" link in footer

header_links.description: Shop landing page for templates, digital resources, UI kits, and merchandise
Articles and insights on design and UX
Saved case studies and digital products

footer_links.description: View all work and case studies
Visit the shop for templates and products
Read design articles and UX case studies
Subscribe to the monthly design tips newsletter
Terms of use, privacy policy, and shipping/returns
